title: [LLVM][InstCombine] Enable constant folding for SVE sdiv & udiv intrinsics.

tests.test_body:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare <vscale x 4 x i32> @llvm.aarch64.sve.sdiv.nxv4i32(<vscale x 4 x i1>, <vscale x 4 x i32>, <vscale x 4 x i32>) #0

define <vscale x 4 x i32> @simplify_sdiv_intrinsic(<vscale x 4 x i32> %a, <vscale x 4 x i32> %b) #1 {
tests.source_program:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare <vscale x 4 x i32> @llvm.aarch64.sve.sdiv.nxv4i32(<vscale x 4 x i1>, <vscale x 4 x i32>, <vscale x 4 x i32>) #0

define <vscale x 4 x i32> @simplify_sdiv_intrinsic(<vscale x 4 x i32> %a, <vscale x 4 x i32> %b) #1 {
  %r = tail call <vscale x 4 x i32> @llvm.aarch64.sve.sdiv.nxv4i32(<vscale x 4 x i1> zeroinitializer, <vscale x 4 x i32> %a, <vscale x 4 x i32> %b)
  ret <vscale x 4 x i32> %r
}

define <vscale x 4 x i32> @simplify_udiv_intrinsic(<vscale x 4 x i32> %a, <vscale x 4 x i32> %b) #1 {

tests.test_body:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare <vscale x 4 x i32> @llvm.aarch64.sve.sdiv.nxv4i32(<vscale x 4 x i1>, <vscale x 4 x i32>, <vscale x 4 x i32>) #0

define <vscale x 4 x i32> @replace_sdiv_intrinsic_i32(<vscale x 4 x i32> %a, <vscale x 4 x i32> %b) #1 {
tests.source_program:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare <vscale x 4 x i32> @llvm.aarch64.sve.sdiv.nxv4i32(<vscale x 4 x i1>, <vscale x 4 x i32>, <vscale x 4 x i32>) #0

define <vscale x 4 x i32> @replace_sdiv_intrinsic_i32(<vscale x 4 x i32> %a, <vscale x 4 x i32> %b) #1 {
  %r = tail call <vscale x 4 x i32> @llvm.aarch64.sve.sdiv.nxv4i32(<vscale x 4 x i1> shufflevector (<vscale x 4 x i1> insertelement (<vscale x 4 x i1> poison, i1 true, i64 0), <vscale x 4 x i1> poison, <vscale x 4 x i32> zeroinitializer), <vscale x 4 x i32> %a, <vscale x 4 x i32> %b)
  ret <vscale x 4 x i32> %r
}
